title: Stanhopea lyncea

This orchid species is native to tropical regions of Central and South America, where it grows in humid forests. The genus Stanhopea is a part of the family Orchidaceae. Stanhopea lyncea is a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows in the ground rather than on other plants or trees.
